inline_comments.message:
I noticed these 2 jobs take the {project-name} variable to name the job in Jenkins which is "multicloud-openstack-vmware". I wonder if you guys are ok with this, or would like to add these 2 jobs in a new project block where {project-name} is "multicloud-openstack-vmware-vio" instead.
For example: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/ci-management/+/91562/2/jjb/dcaegen2/dcaegen2-services-bbs-eventprocessor-java.yaml
Hi Jessica, it's okay to keep the project-name as "multicloud-openstack-vmware" here. Thanks for remind.
